Smart Hospital Bed Allocation System
Spring Boot · Kafka · Redis · PostgreSQL · WebSocket
• Built a backend system to track hospital bed status in real time (Available, Occupied, Cleaning, Reserved)

profile.resumeText:
MACHA JAYANTH 
+91 6300021278  |  23r11a05c2@gcet.edu.in  |  LinkedIn  |  GitHub  |  LeetCode  |  Hyderabad, India 
 
Education 
 
B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering 
2023 – 2027 
Geethanjali College of Engineering & Technology, Hyderabad  |  CGPA: 8.32 
 
Technical Skills 
 
Java: OOPs, Collections, Exception Handling, Multithreading, Java 8 Streams 
Backend: Spring Boot, Spring MVC, REST APIs, Spring Security (JWT) 
Database: MySQL, PostgreSQL, Basic SQL (Joins, Queries) 
Tools: Git, GitHub, Postman, IntelliJ IDEA, Docker (basic) 
Other: Salesforce (Apex, LWC, Flow Builder), Python, JavaScript, HTML/CSS 
 
Projects 
 
Smart Hospital Bed Allocation System 
Spring Boot · Kafka · Redis · PostgreSQL · WebSocket 
• Built a backend system to track hospital bed status in real time (Available, Occupied, Cleaning, Reserved) 
using Spring Boot and a state machine approach. 
• Used Kafka to send bed status updates as events so ward dashboards get notified instantly without database 
overload. 
• Stored recent bed and user session data in Redis to speed up matching between incoming patients and 
available beds. 
• Created REST APIs secured with JWT authentication and tested them using Postman and JUnit. 
 
AI Career Agent – Job Assistant 
Python · LangChain · GPT-4o-mini · Streamlit 
• Built an AI-powered tool that searches job portals and helps match job descriptions to a candidate's profile 
automatically. 
• Added a skill gap feature using LangChain that reads a job description and suggests what skills to learn. 
• Created a simple Streamlit dashboard to track job applications and email follow-ups. 
 
AgriSure – Crop Insurance App 
Python · React.js · Scikit-Learn · Blockchain 
• Developed a web app that uses a machine learning model (Random Forest) to predict crop yield and help 
validate insurance claims. 
• Used smart contracts to keep insurance claim records transparent and tamper-proof. 
 
TalentTrack – Recruitment System 
Salesforce · Apex · LWC · Flow Builder 
• Built on Salesforce to manage the hiring process from application to offer, using custom objects and flows. 
• Automated email alerts to hiring managers when application status changes using Record-Triggered Flows. 
 
Achievements 
 
• ICPC Chennai 2025: 5th Place – Multi-Provincial Contest 
• HackTheHammer 2024: 1st Place among 30+ teams 
• Code Builders 2025: 6th Place – Competitive Programming 
• DSA: Solved 300+ problems on LeetCode, CodeChef, and SmartInterviews 
• Organized the ALGORHYTHM coding event at BHASWARA 2K26

As a passionate and driven B.Tech student specializing in Computer Science, I am eager to 
leverage my skills in programming, web development, and problem-solving to contribute to

diverse teams, and apply my knowledge of modern technologies like MERN stack and Java

learn, I aim to make a positive difference in the tech world while enhancing my capabilities 
for future challenges.
